fields.label: What is your decision?
fields.hint: Select the outcome of this mandatory reconsideration.
options: Revise the original decision in the applicant's favour
Revise the original decision — reduced award

sections.title: Daily living activities
descriptors: Managing therapy or monitoring a health condition
Reading and understanding signs, symbols and words
Engaging with other people face to face

fields.label: Finding for daily living activities
fields.hint: Does the evidence support that the applicant has limited ability in daily living activities?

fields.label: Reasoning
fields.hint: Explain what evidence you relied on and how you applied the descriptors. Reference specific documents.

fields.label: Finding for mobility activities
fields.hint: Does the evidence support that the applicant has limited mobility?

fields.label: Reasoning
fields.hint: Explain what evidence you relied on and how you applied the descriptors. Reference specific documents.

sections.title: Quality checklist
items: I have considered all the evidence on file
I have applied the correct legal test for each criterion
I have recorded a finding for each relevant descriptor
My reasoning references specific evidence
I have considered the applicant's own account
The decision is consistent with similar cases
The decision notice is written in plain English

noticeTemplate.opening:
Dear {{applicantName}},

We have looked at your request to reconsider the decision about your Personal Independence Payment made on {{originalDecisionDate}}.
noticeTemplate.outcomeUphold: After carefully considering all the evidence, we have decided that the original decision was correct. Your award remains unchanged.
noticeTemplate.outcomeRevise: After carefully considering all the evidence, we have decided to change the original decision.
noticeTemplate.appealRights: If you disagree with this decision, you can appeal to an independent tribunal. You must do this within one month of the date of this letter. To appeal, you need to complete form SSCS1, which you can get from your local Citizens Advice or download from www.gov.uk.
noticeTemplate.closing:
Yours sincerely,

{{caseworkerName}}
Decision Maker
Department for Work and Pensions

fields.label: What is your decision?
fields.hint: Select the outcome of this mandatory reconsideration.
options: Uphold the original decision — fit for work
Revise — limited capability for work (work-related activity group)
Revise — limited capability for work-related activity (support group)

sections.title: Limited capability for work
descriptors: Absence or loss of control whilst conscious
Appropriateness of behaviour with other people

fields.label: Finding for limited capability for work
fields.hint: Does the evidence support that the applicant has limited capability for work?
options: Criteria not met — fewer than 15 points

fields.label: Reasoning
fields.hint: Explain what evidence you relied on and how you scored the descriptors.

sections.title: Limited capability for work-related activity
descriptors: Cannot mobilise more than 50 metres without stopping
Cannot raise either arm to head height
Cannot press a button with either hand
Has substantial risk to themselves or others if found fit for work
Is receiving or recovering from treatment for cancer
Has severe uncontrolled episodes of loss of consciousness

fields.label: Finding for limited capability for work-related activity
fields.hint: Does the evidence support that the applicant should be placed in the support group?
options: Criteria met — at least one support group descriptor applies

fields.label: Reasoning
fields.hint: Explain what evidence you relied on and which support group descriptor applies.

sections.title: Quality checklist
items: I have considered all the evidence on file
I have applied the correct legal test for each descriptor
I have recorded a points score where applicable
My reasoning references specific evidence
I have considered the applicant's own account
The decision is consistent with similar cases
The decision notice is written in plain English

fields.label: What is your decision?
fields.hint: Select the outcome of this mandatory reconsideration.

sections.title: Daytime care needs
descriptors: Frequent attention in connection with bodily functions
Continual supervision to avoid substantial danger

fields.label: Finding for daytime care needs
fields.hint: Does the evidence support that the applicant meets the day condition?

fields.label: Reasoning
fields.hint: Explain what evidence you relied on.

sections.title: Night-time care needs
descriptors: Prolonged or repeated attention at night
Watching over at night for prolonged period or frequent intervals

fields.label: Finding for night-time care needs
fields.hint: Does the evidence support that the applicant meets the night condition?

fields.label: Reasoning
fields.hint: Explain what evidence you relied on.

sections.title: Quality checklist
items: I have considered all the evidence on file
I have applied the correct legal test for day and night conditions
My reasoning references specific evidence
I have considered the applicant's own account
The decision is consistent with similar cases
The decision notice is written in plain English
